evals.prompt: Add Argo CD (https://argoproj.github.io/cd/) to my notes. It's a declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes.
evals.expected_output: A markdown table row for Argo CD is appended to Kubernetes.md. The entry includes the URL and a concise description. The chosen note is justified.

assertions.text: The target note is Kubernetes.md (not a generic fallback like Tools.md or DevOps.md)
The proposed table row contains the URL https://argoproj.github.io/cd/
The proposed table row uses 'Argo CD' (or 'ArgoCD') as the link text
The description in the table row is factual and ≤20 words (no marketing language)
The rationale for the chosen note was explicitly stated

evals.prompt: Save Grafana to my vault — https://grafana.com — it's an open source analytics and observability platform for metrics, logs and traces.
evals.expected_output: A markdown table row for Grafana is appended to Observability.md. The entry includes the URL and a concise description.

assertions.text: The target note is Observability.md (not Tools.md, DevOps.md, or a cloud provider note)
The proposed table row contains the URL https://grafana.com
The proposed table row uses 'Grafana' as the link text
The description in the table row mentions analytics, monitoring, or visualization
The rationale for the chosen note was explicitly stated before making the edit

evals.prompt: Add Temporal (https://temporal.io) to my PKM. It's a durable workflow execution engine for writing fault-tolerant distributed code as plain functions.
evals.expected_output: A markdown table row for Temporal is appended to Workflow Orchestration.md or Data Orchestration.md (or a new generalizing note is proposed with user confirmation).

assertions.text: The target note is Workflow Orchestration.md or Data Orchestration.md (not Tools.md or a generic catch-all)
The proposed table row contains the URL https://temporal.io
The proposed table row uses 'Temporal' as the link text
If a new note is proposed, it is a generalizing note (e.g. 'Workflow Engines') not a single-tool note
If a new note is proposed, the user is asked for confirmation before creation
